class.name: AudioStreamSynchronized
class.brief_description: Stores multiple sub-[AudioStream]s, which will be played in synchrony.
class.description: [AudioStreamSynchronized] plays all of its sub-streams at the same time. [b]Note:[/b] A sub-stream looping will not affect other sub-streams.

method.name: get_sync_stream_volume
method.description: Returns the volume of a stream, by index.

method.name: set_sync_stream_volume
method.description: Sets the volume of a stream, by index.

members.member: The total amount of streams that will be played back synchronized.

constants.constant: Maximum number of streams that can be synchronized.
